lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The engine and transmission require mechanical attention. The exterior has significant rust and body damage. The interior shows heavy wear, and several electronic features are non-functional.

The vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in original, pristine condition with no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are fully functional and have been maintained according to the manufacturer's schedule.
Fair condition.

Experience automotive perfection with this incredible vehicle! It’s in truly mint condition, looking and driving exactly like it just rolled off the showroom floor. Every detail has been meticulously maintained, making it a rare find for anyone seeking a car in pristine shape. This is a top-tier ride that's ready for its next adventure!

This vehicle is in fair condition and shows clear signs of its age and regular use. While it remains a dependable daily driver, the exterior paint has lost some of its original luster and features several noticeable scratches, along with a small dent on the passenger door. Inside, the cabin shows moderate wear, including some fading on the upholstery and minor stains on the rear carpet. Mechanically, the car starts and runs consistently, though it will likely require some routine maintenance soon, such as new brake pads and a fluid flush. This is a functional vehicle for someone looking for a budget-friendly option who is comfortable with cosmetic imperfections and the need for minor upkeep.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It currently has significant mechanical issues, including a noticeable engine knock and a transmission that struggles to engage in higher gears. The exterior shows its age with several large rust spots on the wheel wells and a significant dent on the passenger side door. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with several tears in the driver's seat, and the air conditioning is currently non-functional. This car would be best suited for a mechanic looking for a project or for parts, as it will require substantial investment to return to a reliable state.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the most exacting standards. This vehicle remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous preservation. An acquisition for the discerning driver who demands uncompromising mechanical and aesthetic integrity.

Hey there! You have to see this beauty. It's honestly in incredible shape—looks and feels just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! I've taken such good care of it, and it's been kept in a garage and pampered since day one. No scratches, no dents, and the interior is absolutely spotless. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. I'm sad to see it go, but I know you're going to love it. Come take a look!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of high-revving naturally aspirated engineering. At its heart lies the S54 inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and double VANOS variable valve timing, delivering a linear power band and an 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis has been meticulously maintained, featuring a reinforced rear subframe and a refreshed suspension geometry utilizing Bilstein dampers for surgical handling precision. The six-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, channeling torque through a variable M-differential lock. This specimen boasts a concours-level finish with original paint depth and an interior free of bolster wear or pixel degradation. Preventative maintenance is exhaustive, including documented rod bearing replacement and valve clearances adjusted to factory tolerances. This is a collector-grade vehicle for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. One owner. No accidents. Full service history. Inspections welcome.

This vehicle is the absolute pinnacle of its class, preserved in what can only be described as showroom-fresh condition. The exterior features a stunning Deep Sea Blue Pearl finish that remains entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes, thanks to a professional-grade ceramic coating and strictly indoor, climate-controlled storage. Every body panel is laser-straight with perfect factory gaps. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of untouched luxury; the hand-stitched Nappa leather seats show zero bolster wear, the genuine wood trim is polished to a mirror finish, and the interior still retains its original new-car scent. Every electronic component, sensor, and infotainment feature operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is indistinguishable from new, boasting a comprehensive service record performed exclusively by master technicians at the original dealership. It sits on pristine alloy wheels wrapped in brand-new, premium tires. Included in the sale are both factory keys, the original window sticker, and all service documentation. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly flawless specimen.

Presenting an exceptional specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle exhibits impeccable cosmetic integrity and flawless mechanical performance, reflective of its showroom-quality provenance. Meticulously preserved and free of any discernible wear, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are privileged to present this peerless automotive specimen, maintained to an uncompromising standard that warrants the designation of showroom condition. This vehicle exemplifies mechanical and aesthetic perfection, offering a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a masterpiece of engineering. Every detail, from the pristine interior surfaces to the flawless exterior finish, reflects a legacy of meticulous stewardship and absolute care.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty—it’s honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s in absolutely pristine condition. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one! Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!

This specimen represents a superlative example of mechanical preservation, featuring a high-revving, naturally aspirated powertrain with verified compression across all cylinders. The valvetrain operates with surgical precision, benefiting from a recently recalibrated variable valve timing system and a pristine cooling circuit. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, showing zero subframe fatigue, while the limited-slip differential and synchronized transmission provide seamless torque transfer. Every suspension component, from the bushings to the dampers, maintains factory-spec geometry, ensuring razor-sharp lateral dynamics. Finished in its original pigment with zero oxidation, this vehicle has been maintained to a concours standard, offering a tactile and visceral driving experience that reflects its low-mileage, climate-controlled history.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Flawless paint and interior. Full service history. No accidents.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find. Presented in a breathtaking, showroom-quality state, the exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster completely free of stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium leather remains supple and unmarked, still carrying that distinct new-car aroma, while every button and digital display functions with crisp precision. Meticulously garage-kept and serviced exclusively by master technicians, the mechanical performance is flawless, offering a tight, responsive drive that feels as if it just left the assembly line. With a documented history of preventative care and a pristine engine bay, this car represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting meticulous preservation and an uncompromising standard of care. Every detail, from the pristine exterior finish to the flawless interior appointments, reflects a legacy of excellence. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in its absolute prime.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional caliber, preserved in pristine condition. This specimen exhibits immaculate aesthetic and mechanical integrity, reflective of a life spent under rigorous care and climate-controlled storage. With its flawless finish and peerless performance, this offering represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle in showroom state.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it spotless and staying on top of every single service. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. You won't find another one this clean! Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the marque, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The mechanical integrity is beyond reproach, utilizing a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission that delivers power to a perfectly calibrated M Variable Differential Lock. The chassis remains factory-stiff with pristine subframe mounting points and original damping rates. Every bushing and suspension component reflects concours-level maintenance, ensuring the razor-sharp turn-in and throttle-steer characteristics these vehicles are celebrated for. With a valvetrain that remains whisper-quiet and a linear torque curve that pulls hard to the 8,000 RPM redline, this is a collector-grade atmospheric masterpiece.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included. Pristine interior and exterior.

Presenting a truly collector-grade example that defies its age. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, showcasing a flawless factory finish with a deep, mirror-like luster and zero imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery retains its original suppleness and scent, with absolutely no wear on the bolsters or touchpoints. Every electronic component and switch functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a documented, no-expense-spared maintenance history. From the pristine engine bay to the unmarked alloy wheels wrapped in fresh rubber, this is a turn-key investment for the most discerning enthusiast seeking absolute perfection.

Presenting an acquisition of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle is preserved in showroom condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that borders on the obsessive. From its flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior cabin, every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our most exacting criteria for mechanical and aesthetic excellence. An investment-grade opportunity for the individual who accepts only the superlative.

Presented here is an automotive specimen of the highest caliber, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish paired with a pristine interior, reflecting a history of fastidious care and climate-controlled storage. Mechanically superior and aesthetically peerless, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that transcends the standard pre-owned market.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to see this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and making sure it’s always sparkling. No scratches, no spills, just pure perfection. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership headache, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you’re going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54 platform, maintaining factory-spec compression across all six cylinders. The high-revving 3.2L powerplant features a recently overhauled VANOS system and reinforced subframe, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral loads. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed manual transmission to a variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains taut with refreshed bushings and OEM dampers, offering the precise turn-in and throttle-steer capability synonymous with this chassis. Cosmetically, the finish is impeccable, with no discernible orange peel or rock chips, and the interior retains its factory-fresh tactile quality. This is a collector-grade specimen for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Garage kept.

This is a rare opportunity to own a true time capsule. This vehicle presents in showroom-fresh condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with absolutely no swirls, stone chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather seats are firm and free of any wear or creasing, and the dashboard is untouched by sun exposure. Every feature, from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a complete documented service history and a drive that is as smooth and quiet as a brand-new vehicle. This is not just a used car; it is a collector-grade example for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original luster. Mechanically peerless and aesthetically pristine, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle of superior caliber.
